currentFAQs.q: How much does a fence cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for fence installation, depending on material and yard size.

currentFAQs.q: What is the cheapest fence material?
currentFAQs.a: Chain link is the most affordable fencing option at $15-$25 per linear foot installed. Wood privacy fencing is the next most affordable at $25-$50 per linear foot.

currentFAQs.q: How long does a wood fence last?
currentFAQs.a: A well-maintained wood fence typically lasts 15-20 years. Regular staining and sealing every 2-3 years can significantly extend its lifespan. Cedar and redwood last longer than pine.
